description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the julia:1.10 Docker image. Include a before_script that runs `julia --version` and echoes the environment variables TRAVIS_BRANCH, TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST, TRAVIS_REPO_SLUG, TRAVIS_OS_NAME, TRAVIS_JULIA_VERSION. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that executes `julia --project=doc --check-bounds=yes --color=yes -e 'include("doc/make.jl")'` then `mv doc/build public`, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. The job runs in the deploy stage and has no additional rules.
